description: The ProtoFluxImpulseListManager component is used to manage lists and their visuals like in the sequence ProtoFlux node.

fields.Visual: The visual of the protoflux node this is making a list for.
fields.List: The list this is managing and making a UI for.
fields.MinElements: The minimum elements allowed in the list.
fields.AddButtonEnabled: The enabled field of adding a list item.
fields.RemoveButtonEnabled: The enabled field of removing a list item.
fields._elements: The list of elements defining the impulse connectors.
fields.ImpulseType: The type of impulse this is using (ex: Async or normal)

methods.AddElement: Called when the add element button is touched.
methods.RemoveElement: Called when the remove element button is touched.

usage: Used in nodes like the sequence and async sequence nodes.
